examples: He is notoriously indiscreet about his private life.
Tom was utterly indiscreet, and could never keep a secret.
It was forbidden to mention names of friends as it is indiscreet.
Indiscreet old partners will be eager to tell the writer how it really was in the early days.
And the second volume of Alan Clark's diaries is easily as wickedly indiscreet and entertaining as the first.
